channel.title: Microbiome Digest
channel.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
channel.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-11
item.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
item.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-10
item.description: Michael Snyder's team at bioRxiv has unveiled the first GWAS catalog for dogs, analyzing blood biomarkers and breed genetics in 7,627 pet dogs from the Dog Aging Project. | A new study in Nature Medicine explores how the gut microbiome can be harnessed to enhance cancer immunotherapy. | New research from bioRxiv reveals that fasting boosts small intestinal regeneration after radiation damage through a microbiome-driven mechanism.
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
item.itunes:summary: Michael Snyder's team at bioRxiv has unveiled the first GWAS catalog for dogs, analyzing blood biomarkers and breed genetics in 7,627 pet dogs from the Dog Aging Project. | A new study in Nature Medicine explores how the gut microbiome can be harnessed to enhance cancer immunotherapy. | New research from bioRxiv reveals that fasting boosts small intestinal regeneration after radiation damage through a microbiome-driven mechanism.
